rationale_source: TT=3rd mortgage: ARCHITECTURE-AMENDMENT-CANDIDATE per DECISIONS-NEEDED.md #2. Spec captures expected behavior IF Vienna canonical_map supports 3rd-position; Phase 5 triage reveals empirical gap.

mortgage_position.rationale: F1.MP per broker statement. ASSUMING canonical_map enum includes '3rd mortgage'; if not, Phase 1 matrix amendment surfaces.

combined_ltv_with_existing_2nd.rationale: ($380k 1st + $85k 2nd from extraText + $50k new 3rd) / $720k = 71.5%. Assumes Vienna combined-LTV math extended to N-position (architecture-amendment surface).

must_include.rationale: F1.MP per spec ASSUMING canonical enum supports.
